TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Chad, title = Chad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chad} }

S.FORM: Chad Chad i Africa a kanatal, u bunak amin i labu nu kanatal, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatayay a balucu' i Africa". inayi' ku bayu' i kanatal. caledes ku demiad hamin a mihca. u siwkay nu kanatal u Chad sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 15 00 N, 19 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1.284 million km2 u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,259,200 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 24,800 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 11,852,462. kakalukan umah sa 39.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 9.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 51.30%. Chad masakaputay a kanatal , ngangan u Chad han, (u imi aca, A-la-buo a kamu, ÿ™ÿ¥ÿßÿØ‚Äé T≈°ƒÅd; Fa-kou a kamu, Tchad /'t É√¶d/) nu Fay-cou tepanay lalabuay nu kanatal, nuamisan mitules tu Li-pi-ya nuwalian mitules tu Su-tan atu nu timulan nu Central african republic , satipan nutimulan nababiyaw tu Ce-may-lung, Nay-ci-li-ya, satipan atu Ni-zea kanatal u kalikeluhan, malikeluh. uyni u Chad a kakitizaan u tepan nu Fey-zou, mabatad ku bayu, paymihcaan caledes ku demiad, satu u lala' nu kanatal kakitizaan u likelikenan namin, sisa pangangan han tu "mapatayay a balucu' nu Fey-zou han". (u kamu nu Hulam sa: T≈°ƒÅd; Ê≥ïË™û:Tchad i/'t É√¶d/), ".) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u N'Djamena . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 11 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mahamat D√©by, micakat a demiad sa i 1990 a mihca 12 bulad 2 demiad. u cunli nu Chad ayza sa ci Albert Pahimi Padack√©, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 26 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chad sa, izaw ku tulu a kulit, u cunusay a semilaway, u cunusay a takuliway atu sumanahay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: Êü•Âæ∑ u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉÅ„É£„ÉâÂÖ±ÂíåÂõΩ u sulit nu Amilika: Chad laylay ayaw nu celah tu 7,000 a mihcaan, Chad nuwamisan a kakitizaan mulangaway mauzipay i hekal, mapadang ku nuenengay nu tademaw , satusa uynian ka kamihcaan i tiniay a kakitizaan saicelang malahat ku tademaw,Chad uyzaan kahenulan maazih ku kasumamadan nisubelidan , a tuud, angangan tuni i Bo-el-ku-en-ney-di-ti-be-se a kakitizaan) taneng talaayaw nu katukuh ayaw nu celah tu ayaw nu 2000 a mihcaan. namakay yayaw nu celah tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu izaw tu sabelen sa ku tademaw i Chadan saupu sa nueneng, katukuh kakilul tu 9 a kasumamadan a mihcaan, kakilulkilul tu sakuwan i Chad nu Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan pakakat atu malawpes, uheni amin naemec milakuwit tunian a kakitizaan miawas tu Sa-ha-la a zazan nu sapaliwan tu tuud. Chad i 1920 a mihcan maala nu Fa-kuo, mala u Fa-kuo tungusay telecilal nu Fay-couan, 1960 a mihcaan, Chad i Fu-lang-suo-wa-tuo-mu-pa-pa-ye anikelidan makay Fa-kuo a misateked , nika Tuo-mu-ba-ba-ye a lalekuan malilid ku nuwamisanay a Mu-si-lin a kakitizaan caay katanengen , sazikuzay i 1965 a mihcaan sasacacay sa amabuwah tu katanaya nu ngangayaw nu lalabuay,1979 a mihcaan, mibelihay a cenbu tu hitay ami tebung tu En-cian-na, mapahezek tu nutimulan tunisakaku pikuwan. nika upabelihay tu cenbu u hitay mikeliday sakakaay a hitayan macaculi ku lalabuay, sazikuzay ci Hay-san-ha-pu-lel pakademec tu nika ngangayawan tahkal satu mala cung-tun,nika i1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nica ku sakakaay a hitay ci Yy-de-li-se-de-pi, 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, Su-tam satipan macacukah i a ci Ta-bu, satu Chad a lilis a kanatal caay katanektek ku kawaw nu kanatal. u hulic pabeli ci Chad tu cacay a sakuwan tu tabakiay nu a kawaw, cung-tung ci Chad u satalakaway nu mukeliday nu kanatal,situngus mikawaw tu cung-tung atu tabang a tademaw sakaput a tademaw nu mikawaway nu cence, pakay pahulicay miliclicay, u talakaway a hitay, kakatizaan a mikuwanay a tademaw atu kanatalay a u pabay nu pakusiay mikawaw tabaki ku ku kalilid . yu tabaki ku kakenuhan a kawaw, cung-tung i ku-min-i-huay amatatengil hawsa taneng amipasakamu tu mahiniay u kacenuhan sasakalahay a tukian a kawaw, Cung-tung u binawlan ku misingkiway lima a mihcacan mala cung-tung, 2005 a mihcaan Chad maawas ku baluhay a nupahulican, papiales tu nu cung-tung tulas kala cung-tungan. i ayaw cung-tung cinacacay dada' batilin kinacacay mala cung-tung, ci Te-bi a cung-tung u angangan u pipalitaan uyzaamin Za-cia-wa a tademaw ,uyzaamin makaiay a sakaput atu timulay paybinacadan i cenbu izawamin i cenbu daysiw, u maanubay i Chad a kanatal atumahiniay , mahapingan ku kitakit i 2005 a mihcaan patahkal tu tamelacay a nisulitan mucel kubalucu' nisulitan paazih Chad a kanatal i kitakit amin u maanubay a pihacengay a kanatal, , 2006 a mihcaan kahini adidi kunikasumat. Chad a hulic patizeng i Fa-kou a tademawan a hulic min-fa atu Chad tunu kasumamadan a hulic, zikuzan satu cayay tu kapipikuwan tu kapulungan a tunipisilut atu hulic paleca tu pidiput, kanahatu u hulic paaning tu Chad misadekeday a kawaw tunu huingay a hulic, nika hamin u kahenulan nu huing a hulic tademaw nu u cung-tung amin kusitungusay satalakaway a huing atu u cung-tung mikawaway. talakaway a huing atu pahulicay a wiy-yun-huay u Chad u satalakaway pasakaput nu huing a hulic , satalakaway a huing cacay a tademawan makay u sakakaay nu huing sakakaay nu huing atu nu zumaay a sakapuaa sabw lima ku tademaw, pakay sakaput a tademaw makay i Tung-tung atu kou-min huy-i ku situngusay, tahadikud ku kal Cung-tung a lekec. pahulicay a wiyen huy siwaay a tademaw ka pulung tu miliclicay, sawa ku kala Tung-tung, wiye huy izaw situngus tu hulic, katatelekan atu kitakit tu ni kakaletekan mikawaw taayaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. Chad maha u kananatal a nikenisan lasic tu 22 a kakitizaan, uynian a zazan i 2003 a mihcaan a kakitizaan a kasilacan a mikawaw, mikutay tu nuyanay tu a kenis tu sabaw sepat, paykakitizaan izaw amin ku cacay Tung-tung ku mikayawaw tu sakakaay nu mikelitay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hekal a lala' Chad malatulu ku mahapingan hekal lala' a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u Sa-ha-la-sa-mu a kakitizaan. tepanay a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan Su-tan nalinabuan a kakitizaan. Chad malalasid tu tuluay angangan nu hekal a lala' kenis, nuwamisan nu likelikenan a kakitizaan nu tunusay u caledesay likelikenan a demiad, tepanay makedal ku Sa-he-el a kakitizaan, tungusay caledesay nu nalinabuwan a demiad atu nutimulan u sidemekay nu Su-dan a nalinabuwan nalinabuwan a kakitizaan, tungusay a caledesay kilangkilangan a demiad, uynian a kanatal u Chad a taku a nupangangan kanatalay sakatalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la a Cu-si a buyu', kahenulan a tuse atu satabakiay a tuse u En-cang-na. Chad a kanatal pulung malakuwi tu 200 nu binacadan, Fa-kuo a kamu atu A-la-po a kamu u kanatalay a kamu, Yi-se-lan-ciaw u sayadahay a singku nu tademaw. Chad yadah u masazumaay a binacadan a kamu, yadah ku kasumamadan nisubelid a lalangawan. Chad cenbu sapilisak patiyak tu cenbu sakalah micucuh tu kunuan kasumamadan atu lalangawan nu kanatal, patahekal tu nu Chad a kanatal piazihan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu Chad pasaupuan tu lalangawan . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .)
S.PHON: ¶ƒßad ¶ƒßad i afri ¶a a kanatar~…æ, u bunak amin i r~…æabu nu kanatar~…æ, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatajaj a bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° i afri ¶a". inaji î~ ° ku baju î~ ° i kanatar~…æ. ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad ƒßamin a miƒß ¶a. u siwkaj nu kanatar~…æ u ¶ƒßad sa i r~…æabu nu afri ¶a, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° mapur~…æu≈ã sa *.*** mir~…ær~…æion km* u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ °aj sa *,***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu nanumaj sa **,*** km* ƒßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…æukan umaƒß sa **.**%, kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan umaƒß sa *.**%, zumaaj ƒß…ônaj umaƒß sa **.**%. ¶ƒßad masakaputaj a kanatar~…æ , ≈ãa≈ãan u ¶ƒßad ƒßan, (u imi a ¶a, a-r~…æa-buo a kamu, ***** t**d; fa-kou a kamu, t ¶ƒßad / î~ °t**d/) nu faj- ¶ou t…ôpanaj r~…æar~…æabuaj nu kanatar~…æ, nuamisan mitur~…æ…ôs tu r~…æi-pi-ja nuwar~…æian mitur~…æ…ôs tu su-tan atu nu timur~…æan nu ¶…ôntrar~…æ afri ¶an r…ôpubr~…æi ¶ , satipan nutimur~…æan nababijaw tu ¶…ô-maj-r~…æu≈ã, naj- ¶i-r~…æi-ja, satipan atu ni-z…ôa kanatar~…æ u kar~…æik…ôr~…æuƒßan, mar~…æik…ôr~…æuƒß. ujni u ¶ƒßad a kakitizaan u t…ôpan nu f…ô-zou, mabatad ku baju, pajmiƒß ¶aan ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad, satu u r~…æar~…æa î~ ° nu kanatar~…æ kakitizaan u r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan namin, sisa pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu "mapatajaj a bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nu f…ô-zou ƒßan". (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam sa: t**d; **:t ¶ƒßad i/ î~ °t**d/), ".) tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ u tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ sa u n î~ °djam…ôna . kakininan nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad kakini≈ã nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad ¶unr~…æi nu ¶ƒßad ajza sa ¶i ar~…æb…ôrt paƒßimi pada ¶k*, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a miƒß ¶aan * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad. u ƒßata u kur~…æit nu ƒßata nu ¶ƒßad sa, izaw ku tur~…æu a kur~…æit, u ¶unusaj a s…ômir~…æawaj, u ¶unusaj a takur~…æiwaj atu sumanaƒßaj. u sur~…æit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam: ** u sur~…æit nu r~…æipun: ****** u sur~…æit nu amir~…æika: ¶ƒßad r~…æajr~…æaj ajaw nu ≈ãa≈ãajawan taƒßkar~…æ satu mar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tun,nika i**** a miƒß ¶aan mapab…ôr~…æin ni ¶a ku sakakaaj a ƒßitaj ¶i jj-d…ô-r~…æi-s…ô-d…ô-pi, **** a miƒß ¶aan mar~…æi≈ãatu, su-tam satipan ma ¶a ¶ukaƒß i a ¶i ta-bu, satu ¶ƒßad a r~…æir~…æis a kanatar~…æ ¶aaj katan…ôkt…ôk ku kawaw nu kanatar~…æ. u ƒßur~…æi ¶ pab…ôr~…æi ¶i ¶ƒßad tu ¶a ¶aj a sakuwan tu tabakiaj nu a kawaw, ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã ¶i ¶ƒßad u satar~…æakawaj nu muk…ôr~…æidaj nu kanatar~…æ,situ≈ãus mikawaw tu ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã atu taba≈ã a tad…ômaw sakaput a tad…ômaw nu mikawawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô, pakaj paƒßur~…æi ¶aj mir~…æi ¶r~…æi ¶aj, u tar~…æakawaj a ƒßitaj, kakatizaan a mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw atu kanatar~…æaj a u pabaj nu pakusiaj mikawaw tabaki ku ku kar~…æir~…æid . ju tabaki ku kak…ônuƒßan a kawaw, ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã i ku-min-i-ƒßuaj amatat…ô≈ãir~…æ ƒßawsa tan…ô≈ã amipasakamu tu maƒßiniaj u ka ¶…ônuƒßan sasakar~…æaƒßaj a tukian a kawaw, ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã u binawr~…æan ku misi≈ãkiwaj r~…æima a miƒß ¶a ¶an mar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã, **** a miƒß ¶aan ¶ƒßad maawas ku bar~…æuƒßaj a nupaƒßur~…æi ¶an, papiar~…æ…ôs tu nu ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã tur~…æas kar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tu≈ãan. i ajaw ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã ¶ina ¶a ¶aj dada î~ ° batir~…æin kina ¶a ¶aj mar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã, ¶i t…ô-bi a ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã u a≈ãa≈ãan u pipar~…æitaan ujzaamin za- ¶ia-wa a tad…ômaw ,ujzaamin makaiaj a sakaput atu timur~…æaj pajbina ¶adan i ¶…ônbu izawamin i ¶…ônbu dajsiw, u maanubaj i ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ atumaƒßiniaj , maƒßapi≈ãan ku kitakit i **** a miƒß ¶aan pataƒßkar~…æ tu tam…ôr~…æa ¶aj a nisur~…æitan mu ¶…ôr~…æ kubar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nisur~…æitan paaziƒß ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ i kitakit amin u maanubaj a piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ, , **** a miƒß ¶aan kaƒßini adidi kunikasumat. ¶ƒßad a ƒßur~…æi ¶ patiz…ô≈ã i fa-kou a tad…ômawan a ƒßur~…æi ¶ min-fa atu ¶ƒßad tunu kasumamadan a ƒßur~…æi ¶, zikuzan satu ¶ajaj tu kapipikuwan tu kapur~…æu≈ãan a tunipisir~…æut atu ƒßur~…æi ¶ par~…æ…ô ¶a tu pidiput, kanaƒßatu u ƒßur~…æi ¶ paani≈ã tu ¶ƒßad misad…ôk…ôdaj a kawaw tunu ƒßui≈ãaj a ƒßur~…æi ¶, nika ƒßamin u kaƒß…ônur~…æan nu ƒßui≈ã a ƒßur~…æi ¶ tad…ômaw nu u ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã amin kusitu≈ãusaj satar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã atu u ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã mikawawaj. tar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã atu paƒßur~…æi ¶aj a wij-jun-ƒßuaj u ¶ƒßad u satar~…æakawaj pasakaput nu ƒßui≈ã a ƒßur~…æi ¶ , satar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan makaj u sakakaaj nu ƒßui≈ã sakakaaj nu ƒßui≈ã atu nu zumaaj a sakapuaa sabw r~…æima ku tad…ômaw, pakaj sakaput a tad…ômaw makaj i tu≈ã-tu≈ã atu kou-min ƒßuj-i ku situ≈ãusaj, taƒßadikud ku kar~…æ ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã a r~…æ…ôk…ô ¶. paƒßur~…æi ¶aj a wij…ôn ƒßuj siwaaj a tad…ômaw ka pur~…æu≈ã tu mir~…æi ¶r~…æi ¶aj, sawa ku kar~…æa tu≈ã-tu≈ã, wij…ô ƒßuj izaw situ≈ãus tu ƒßur~…æi ¶, katat…ôr~…æ…ôkan atu kitakit tu ni kakar~…æ…ôt…ôkan mikawaw taajaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. ¶ƒßad maƒßa u kananatar~…æ a nik…ônisan r~…æasi ¶ tu ** a kakitizaan, ujnian a zazan i **** a miƒß ¶aan a kakitizaan a kasir~…æa ¶an a mikawaw, mikutaj tu nujanaj tu a k…ônis tu sabaw s…ôpat, pajkakitizaan izaw amin ku ¶a ¶aj tu≈ã-tu≈ã ku mikajawaw tu sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…æitaj. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam sa: .) ƒß…ôkar~…æ a r~…æar~…æa î~ ° ¶ƒßad mar~…æatur~…æu ku maƒßapi≈ãan ƒß…ôkar~…æ r~…æar~…æa î~ ° a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u sa-ƒßa-r~…æa-sa-mu a kakitizaan. t…ôpanaj a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan su-tan nar~…æinabuan a kakitizaan. ¶ƒßad mar~…æar~…æasid tu tur~…æuaj a≈ãa≈ãan nu ƒß…ôkar~…æ a r~…æar~…æa î~ ° k…ônis, nuwamisan nu r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan a kakitizaan nu tunusaj u ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan a d…ômiad, t…ôpanaj mak…ôdar~…æ ku sa-ƒß…ô-…ôr~…æ a kakitizaan, tu≈ãusaj ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj nu nar~…æinabuwan a d…ômiad atu nutimur~…æan u sid…ôm…ôkaj nu su-dan a nar~…æinabuwan nar~…æinabuwan a kakitizaan, tu≈ãusaj a ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj kir~…æa≈ãkir~…æa≈ãan a d…ômiad, ujnian a kanatar~…æ u ¶ƒßad a taku a nupa≈ãa≈ãan kanatar~…æaj sakatar~…æakawaj a buju î~ ° tini i sa-ƒßa-r~…æa a ¶u-si a buju î~ °, kaƒß…ônur~…æan a tus…ô atu satabakiaj a tus…ô u …ôn- ¶a≈ã-na. ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ pur~…æu≈ã mar~…æakuwi tu *** nu bina ¶adan, fa-kuo a kamu atu a-r~…æa-po a kamu u kanatar~…æaj a kamu, ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶iaw u sajadaƒßaj a si≈ãku nu tad…ômaw. ¶ƒßad jadaƒß u masazumaaj a bina ¶adan a kamu, jadaƒß ku kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…æid a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. ¶ƒßad ¶…ônbu sapir~…æisak patijak tu ¶…ônbu sakar~…æaƒß mi ¶u ¶uƒß tu kunuan kasumamadan atu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan nu kanatar~…æ, pataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu nu ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ piaziƒßan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu ¶ƒßad pasaupuan tu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan . (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam sa: .)
S.FORM: Chad Chad i Africa a kanatal, u bunak amin i labu nu kanatal, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatayay a balucu' i Africa". inayi' ku bayu' i kanatal. caledes ku demiad hamin a mihca. u siwkay nu kanatal u Chad sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 15 00 N, 19 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1.284 million km2 u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,259,200 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 24,800 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 11,852,462. kakalukan umah sa 39.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 9.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 51.30%. Chad masakaputay a kanatal , ngangan u Chad han, (u imi aca, A-la-buo a kamu, ÿ™ÿ¥ÿßÿØ‚Äé T≈°ƒÅd; Fa-kou a kamu, Tchad /'t É√¶d/) nu Fay-cou tepanay lalabuay nu kanatal, nuamisan mitules tu Li-pi-ya nuwalian mitules tu Su-tan atu nu timulan nu Central african republic , satipan nutimulan nababiyaw tu Ce-may-lung, Nay-ci-li-ya, satipan atu Ni-zea kanatal u kalikeluhan, malikeluh. uyni u Chad a kakitizaan u tepan nu Fey-zou, mabatad ku bayu, paymihcaan caledes ku demiad, satu u lala' nu kanatal kakitizaan u likelikenan namin, sisa pangangan han tu "mapatayay a balucu' nu Fey-zou han". (u kamu nu Hulam sa: T≈°ƒÅd; Ê≥ïË™û:Tchad i/'t É√¶d/), ".) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u N'Djamena . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 11 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mahamat D√©by, micakat a demiad sa i 1990 a mihca 12 bulad 2 demiad. u cunli nu Chad ayza sa ci Albert Pahimi Padack√©, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 26 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chad sa, izaw ku tulu a kulit, u cunusay a semilaway, u cunusay a takuliway atu sumanahay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: Êü•Âæ∑ u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉÅ„É£„ÉâÂÖ±ÂíåÂõΩ u sulit nu Amilika: Chad laylay ayaw nu celah tu 7,000 a mihcaan, Chad nuwamisan a kakitizaan mulangaway mauzipay i hekal, mapadang ku nuenengay nu tademaw , satusa uynian ka kamihcaan i tiniay a kakitizaan saicelang malahat ku tademaw,Chad uyzaan kahenulan maazih ku kasumamadan nisubelidan , a tuud, angangan tuni i Bo-el-ku-en-ney-di-ti-be-se a kakitizaan) taneng talaayaw nu katukuh ayaw nu celah tu ayaw nu 2000 a mihcaan. namakay yayaw nu celah tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu izaw tu sabelen sa ku tademaw i Chadan saupu sa nueneng, katukuh kakilul tu 9 a kasumamadan a mihcaan, kakilulkilul tu sakuwan i Chad nu Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan pakakat atu malawpes, uheni amin naemec milakuwit tunian a kakitizaan miawas tu Sa-ha-la a zazan nu sapaliwan tu tuud. Chad i 1920 a mihcan maala nu Fa-kuo, mala u Fa-kuo tungusay telecilal nu Fay-couan, 1960 a mihcaan, Chad i Fu-lang-suo-wa-tuo-mu-pa-pa-ye anikelidan makay Fa-kuo a misateked , nika Tuo-mu-ba-ba-ye a lalekuan malilid ku nuwamisanay a Mu-si-lin a kakitizaan caay katanengen , sazikuzay i 1965 a mihcaan sasacacay sa amabuwah tu katanaya nu ngangayaw nu lalabuay,1979 a mihcaan, mibelihay a cenbu tu hitay ami tebung tu En-cian-na, mapahezek tu nutimulan tunisakaku pikuwan. nika upabelihay tu cenbu u hitay mikeliday sakakaay a hitayan macaculi ku lalabuay, sazikuzay ci Hay-san-ha-pu-lel pakademec tu nika ngangayawan tahkal satu mala cung-tun,nika i1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nica ku sakakaay a hitay ci Yy-de-li-se-de-pi, 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, Su-tam satipan macacukah i a ci Ta-bu, satu Chad a lilis a kanatal caay katanektek ku kawaw nu kanatal. u hulic pabeli ci Chad tu cacay a sakuwan tu tabakiay nu a kawaw, cung-tung ci Chad u satalakaway nu mukeliday nu kanatal,situngus mikawaw tu cung-tung atu tabang a tademaw sakaput a tademaw nu mikawaway nu cence, pakay pahulicay miliclicay, u talakaway a hitay, kakatizaan a mikuwanay a tademaw atu kanatalay a u pabay nu pakusiay mikawaw tabaki ku ku kalilid . yu tabaki ku kakenuhan a kawaw, cung-tung i ku-min-i-huay amatatengil hawsa taneng amipasakamu tu mahiniay u kacenuhan sasakalahay a tukian a kawaw, Cung-tung u binawlan ku misingkiway lima a mihcacan mala cung-tung, 2005 a mihcaan Chad maawas ku baluhay a nupahulican, papiales tu nu cung-tung tulas kala cung-tungan. i ayaw cung-tung cinacacay dada' batilin kinacacay mala cung-tung, ci Te-bi a cung-tung u angangan u pipalitaan uyzaamin Za-cia-wa a tademaw ,uyzaamin makaiay a sakaput atu timulay paybinacadan i cenbu izawamin i cenbu daysiw, u maanubay i Chad a kanatal atumahiniay , mahapingan ku kitakit i 2005 a mihcaan patahkal tu tamelacay a nisulitan mucel kubalucu' nisulitan paazih Chad a kanatal i kitakit amin u maanubay a pihacengay a kanatal, , 2006 a mihcaan kahini adidi kunikasumat. Chad a hulic patizeng i Fa-kou a tademawan a hulic min-fa atu Chad tunu kasumamadan a hulic, zikuzan satu cayay tu kapipikuwan tu kapulungan a tunipisilut atu hulic paleca tu pidiput, kanahatu u hulic paaning tu Chad misadekeday a kawaw tunu huingay a hulic, nika hamin u kahenulan nu huing a hulic tademaw nu u cung-tung amin kusitungusay satalakaway a huing atu u cung-tung mikawaway. talakaway a huing atu pahulicay a wiy-yun-huay u Chad u satalakaway pasakaput nu huing a hulic , satalakaway a huing cacay a tademawan makay u sakakaay nu huing sakakaay nu huing atu nu zumaay a sakapuaa sabw lima ku tademaw, pakay sakaput a tademaw makay i Tung-tung atu kou-min huy-i ku situngusay, tahadikud ku kal Cung-tung a lekec. pahulicay a wiyen huy siwaay a tademaw ka pulung tu miliclicay, sawa ku kala Tung-tung, wiye huy izaw situngus tu hulic, katatelekan atu kitakit tu ni kakaletekan mikawaw taayaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. Chad maha u kananatal a nikenisan lasic tu 22 a kakitizaan, uynian a zazan i 2003 a mihcaan a kakitizaan a kasilacan a mikawaw, mikutay tu nuyanay tu a kenis tu sabaw sepat, paykakitizaan izaw amin ku cacay Tung-tung ku mikayawaw tu sakakaay nu mikelitay. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) hekal a lala' Chad malatulu ku mahapingan hekal lala' a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u Sa-ha-la-sa-mu a kakitizaan. tepanay a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan Su-tan nalinabuan a kakitizaan. Chad malalasid tu tuluay angangan nu hekal a lala' kenis, nuwamisan nu likelikenan a kakitizaan nu tunusay u caledesay likelikenan a demiad, tepanay makedal ku Sa-he-el a kakitizaan, tungusay caledesay nu nalinabuwan a demiad atu nutimulan u sidemekay nu Su-dan a nalinabuwan nalinabuwan a kakitizaan, tungusay a caledesay kilangkilangan a demiad, uynian a kanatal u Chad a taku a nupangangan kanatalay sakatalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la a Cu-si a buyu', kahenulan a tuse atu satabakiay a tuse u En-cang-na. Chad a kanatal pulung malakuwi tu 200 nu binacadan, Fa-kuo a kamu atu A-la-po a kamu u kanatalay a kamu, Yi-se-lan-ciaw u sayadahay a singku nu tademaw. Chad yadah u masazumaay a binacadan a kamu, yadah ku kasumamadan nisubelid a lalangawan. Chad cenbu sapilisak patiyak tu cenbu sakalah micucuh tu kunuan kasumamadan atu lalangawan nu kanatal, patahekal tu nu Chad a kanatal piazihan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu Chad pasaupuan tu lalangawan . (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .)
S.PHON: ¶ƒßad ¶ƒßad i afri ¶a a kanatar~…æ, u bunak amin i r~…æabu nu kanatar~…æ, sakamu sa ku taw" mapatajaj a bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° i afri ¶a". inaji î~ ° ku baju î~ ° i kanatar~…æ. ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad ƒßamin a miƒß ¶a. u siwkaj nu kanatar~…æ u ¶ƒßad sa i r~…æabu nu afri ¶a, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° mapur~…æu≈ã sa *.*** mir~…ær~…æion km* u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ °aj sa *,***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu nanumaj sa **,*** km* ƒßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…æukan umaƒß sa **.**%, kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan umaƒß sa *.**%, zumaaj ƒß…ônaj umaƒß sa **.**%. ¶ƒßad masakaputaj a kanatar~…æ , ≈ãa≈ãan u ¶ƒßad ƒßan, (u imi a ¶a, a-r~…æa-buo a kamu, ***** t**d; fa-kou a kamu, t ¶ƒßad / î~ °t**d/) nu faj- ¶ou t…ôpanaj r~…æar~…æabuaj nu kanatar~…æ, nuamisan mitur~…æ…ôs tu r~…æi-pi-ja nuwar~…æian mitur~…æ…ôs tu su-tan atu nu timur~…æan nu ¶…ôntrar~…æ afri ¶an r…ôpubr~…æi ¶ , satipan nutimur~…æan nababijaw tu ¶…ô-maj-r~…æu≈ã, naj- ¶i-r~…æi-ja, satipan atu ni-z…ôa kanatar~…æ u kar~…æik…ôr~…æuƒßan, mar~…æik…ôr~…æuƒß. ujni u ¶ƒßad a kakitizaan u t…ôpan nu f…ô-zou, mabatad ku baju, pajmiƒß ¶aan ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad, satu u r~…æar~…æa î~ ° nu kanatar~…æ kakitizaan u r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan namin, sisa pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu "mapatajaj a bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nu f…ô-zou ƒßan". ¶i ta-bu, satu ¶ƒßad a r~…æir~…æis a kanatar~…æ ¶aaj katan…ôkt…ôk ku kawaw nu kanatar~…æ. u ƒßur~…æi ¶ pab…ôr~…æi ¶i ¶ƒßad tu ¶a ¶aj a sakuwan tu tabakiaj nu a kawaw, ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã ¶i ¶ƒßad u a≈ãa≈ãan u pipar~…æitaan ujzaamin za- ¶ia-wa a tad…ômaw ,ujzaamin makaiaj a sakaput atu timur~…æaj pajbina ¶adan i ¶…ônbu izawamin i ¶…ônbu dajsiw, u maanubaj i ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ atumaƒßiniaj , maƒßapi≈ãan ku kitakit i **** a miƒß ¶aan pataƒßkar~…æ tu tam…ôr~…æa ¶aj a nisur~…æitan mu ¶…ôr~…æ kubar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nisur~…æitan paaziƒß ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ i kitakit amin u maanubaj a piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ, , **** a miƒß ¶aan kaƒßini adidi kunikasumat. ¶ƒßad a ƒßur~…æi ¶ patiz…ô≈ã i fa-kou a tad…ômawan a ƒßur~…æi ¶ min-fa atu ¶ƒßad tunu kasumamadan a ƒßur~…æi ¶, zikuzan satu ¶ajaj tu kapipikuwan tu kapur~…æu≈ãan a tunipisir~…æut atu ƒßur~…æi ¶ par~…æ…ô ¶a tu pidiput, kanaƒßatu u ƒßur~…æi ¶ paani≈ã tu ¶ƒßad misad…ôk…ôdaj a kawaw tunu ƒßui≈ãaj a ƒßur~…æi ¶, nika ƒßamin u kaƒß…ônur~…æan nu ƒßui≈ã a ƒßur~…æi ¶ tad…ômaw nu u ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã amin kusitu≈ãusaj satar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã atu u ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã mikawawaj. tar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã atu paƒßur~…æi ¶aj a wij-jun-ƒßuaj u ¶ƒßad u satar~…æakawaj pasakaput nu ƒßui≈ã a ƒßur~…æi ¶ , satar~…æakawaj a ƒßui≈ã ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan makaj u sakakaaj nu ƒßui≈ã sakakaaj nu ƒßui≈ã atu nu zumaaj a sakapuaa sabw r~…æima ku tad…ômaw, pakaj sakaput a tad…ômaw makaj i tu≈ã-tu≈ã atu kou-min ƒßuj-i ku situ≈ãusaj, taƒßadikud ku kar~…æ ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã a r~…æ…ôk…ô ¶. paƒßur~…æi ¶aj a wij…ôn ƒßuj siwaaj a tad…ômaw ka pur~…æu≈ã tu mir~…æi ¶r~…æi ¶aj, sawa ku kar~…æa tu≈ã-tu≈ã, wij…ô ƒßuj izaw situ≈ãus tu ƒßur~…æi ¶, katat…ôr~…æ…ôkan atu kitakit tu ni kakar~…æ…ôt…ôkan mikawaw taajaw a mikinsa tu sakuwanan. ¶ƒßad maƒßa u kananatar~…æ a nik…ônisan r~…æasi ¶ tu ** a kakitizaan, ujnian a zazan i **** a miƒß ¶aan a kakitizaan a kasir~…æa ¶an a mikawaw, mikutaj tu nujanaj tu a k…ônis tu sabaw s…ôpat, pajkakitizaan izaw amin ku ¶a ¶aj tu≈ã-tu≈ã ku mikajawaw tu sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…æitaj. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam sa: .) ƒß…ôkar~…æ a r~…æar~…æa î~ ° ¶ƒßad mar~…æatur~…æu ku maƒßapi≈ãan ƒß…ôkar~…æ r~…æar~…æa î~ ° a kakitizaan, nuwamisan u sa-ƒßa-r~…æa-sa-mu a kakitizaan. t…ôpanaj a kakitizaan atu nuwamisan su-tan nar~…æinabuan a kakitizaan. ¶ƒßad mar~…æar~…æasid tu tur~…æuaj a≈ãa≈ãan nu ƒß…ôkar~…æ a r~…æar~…æa î~ ° k…ônis, nuwamisan nu r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan a kakitizaan nu tunusaj u ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan a d…ômiad, t…ôpanaj mak…ôdar~…æ ku sa-ƒß…ô-…ôr~…æ a kakitizaan, tu≈ãusaj ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj nu nar~…æinabuwan a d…ômiad atu nutimur~…æan u sid…ôm…ôkaj nu su-dan a nar~…æinabuwan nar~…æinabuwan a kakitizaan, tu≈ãusaj a ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsaj kir~…æa≈ãkir~…æa≈ãan a d…ômiad, ujnian a kanatar~…æ u ¶ƒßad a taku a nupa≈ãa≈ãan kanatar~…æaj sakatar~…æakawaj a buju î~ ° tini i sa-ƒßa-r~…æa a ¶u-si a buju î~ °, kaƒß…ônur~…æan a tus…ô atu satabakiaj a tus…ô u …ôn- ¶a≈ã-na. ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ pur~…æu≈ã mar~…æakuwi tu *** nu bina ¶adan, fa-kuo a kamu atu a-r~…æa-po a kamu u kanatar~…æaj a kamu, ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶iaw u sajadaƒßaj a si≈ãku nu tad…ômaw. ¶ƒßad jadaƒß u masazumaaj a bina ¶adan a kamu, jadaƒß ku kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…æid a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. ¶ƒßad ¶…ônbu sapir~…æisak patijak tu ¶…ônbu sakar~…æaƒß mi ¶u ¶uƒß tu kunuan kasumamadan atu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan nu kanatar~…æ, pataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu nu ¶ƒßad a kanatar~…æ piaziƒßan tu tuud nu kasumamadan atu ¶ƒßad pasaupuan tu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan . (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam sa: .)
